<!-- indicator: tbl-pc-big-hlth-prob -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-pc-big-hlth-prob
#| tbl-cap: 'Biggest Health Problems in Populations Served, Putnam County (n = 128)'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-pc-big-hlth-prob", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-pc-big-hlth-prob", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
